title: ranunculus coleophorus
intro: Ranunculus coleophorus, also known as Butcher's broom or Ruscus, is a plant species that belongs to the Ruscus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as varicose veins, hemorrhoids, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ranunculus coleophorus include improved circulation, reduced swelling, and relief from digestive discomfort, making it a popular herbal remedy for these conditions. Ranunculus coleophorus is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical cream, and is also used in some herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
